title: Galactic Criminals Act
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Galactic Criminals Act''' was an act enacted by the government of [[Telos IV]]. The law enabled Telosian security forces to apprehend suspected criminals and hold them to a trial.

[[Xanatos]] utilized the legislature to arrest his former [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]], the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Day of Reckoning]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
